hooks.command: echo 'đź©ş Iniciando diagnĂłstico automĂˇtico do projeto...' && bash scripts/monitor.sh . 2>&1 | head -80

node -e "const fs=require('fs');try{const i=fs.readFileSync('.claude/brain/inbox/wesley.md','utf8');const n=i.split('\n').filter(l=>l.startsWith('-')).length;console.log('[Brain] Inbox de Wesley: '+n+' item(ns) pendente(s)')}catch(e){console.log('[Brain] Inbox vazio â€” primeira sessĂŁo')}"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const inbox='.claude/brain/inbox/wesley.md';const now=new Date();const stamp=now.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR')+' '+now.toLocaleTimeString('pt-BR',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});try{let c=fs.readFileSync(inbox,'utf8');const entry='
---
### SessĂŁo encerrada â€” '+stamp+'
> Diga **@amora faz o compact** na prĂłxima sessĂŁo para salvar as decisĂµes.
';c+=entry;fs.writeFileSync(inbox,c,'utf8');console.log('[Amora] âś… SessĂŁo registrada no inbox â€” '+stamp)}catch(e){console.log('[Amora] Inbox nĂŁo encontrado: '+e.message)}"
